package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationMultiplePassesForIndependentCounts() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_collection_iteration_multiple_passes_for_independent_counts"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Collection iteration. Flag multiple full passes over the same slice for independent counters that can be combined."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
